status: P1 EVIDENCE CLOSURE WAVE 4 / COMBINATION ANALYTICS BLOCK ACTIVE / NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
classification: Fixed-ratio supplier neurocognitive and anxiolytic peptide blend
mechanism_summary: No validated combination mechanism is assigned. Separate neurotrophic, neuroimmune and anxiolytic research cannot be combined as proof.
evidence_maturity: No direct fixed-ratio combination-specific human efficacy, PK or safety evidence has been closed.
regulatory_headline: UNAPPROVED SUPPLIER NEUROPEPTIDE COMBINATION / REGIONAL PARENT STATUS DOES NOT TRANSFER

catalogue_supplier_skus.specification: Semax 10 mg + Selank 10 mg; 20 mg x 10 vials

closure_class: FIXED-RATIO NEUROPEPTIDE BLEND / LIMITED HUMAN AND QUALITY EVIDENCE
closure_state: BLOCKED — EXACT PARENT FORMS, FIXED RATIO, CO-FORMULATION, ROUTE, STABILITY AND DIRECT COMBINATION HUMAN EVIDENCE UNVERIFIED
authoritative_product_boundary: Semax and Selank are distinct heptapeptides with separate regional and experimental literatures. FDA lists both nominated bulk substances among compounds that may present significant compounding safety risks because of immunogenicity, aggregation, peptide impurities and limited safety information. A shared mechanistic paper is not a fixed-ratio clinical trial.
critical_closure_controls: Semax and Selank remain separate parent molecules
Shared enzyme effects do not establish blend efficacy
FDA compounding safety concerns remain active for both components
No anxiety, cognition, stroke or neuroprotection-treatment claim
No nasal, dosing, injection or reconstitution protocol
